_comment: Illustrative example of a structured validation error response from the input contract intake validator. The exact error response shape is a convention; the input contract schema specifies the rules that produce these errors.

errors.message: jurisdiction must be an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, an ISO 3166-2 region code, or one of EU, EEA, UK, GLOBAL
documentation_artifacts must contain at least one artifact reference
